reviews.review_title: Might be the best grappler app I tried.
reviews.review_description: Truly fun and gives this vr veteren some vertigo, which is a good sign!
Really is an amazing idea and the developers have done a great job with the execution of that idea. Really fun and indulging. I am excited to see where this goes!

Why so many games listed as being for BOTH quest 1 and 2 - and then problems.
Followed by a tiny note somewhere hidden that Quest 1 isn't supported.
I wouldn't be so mad if games would be just listed properly - so I don't get my hopes up.
But also - WHY NOT MAKE IT QUEST 1 compatible from the start?
I understand its only in BETA but I don't have any faith that these games will get QUEST 1 attention.

developer_response.body:
Hi Rpyr8,

Sorry about this. Unfortunately it's an Oculus issue - there is a single submission for Quest apps and no way to specify that a game supports Quest 2 but not Quest 1.
We are hoping to bring Quest 1 support soon but it wouldn't be possible to do during prototyping with our team size. Optimizing for Quest 1 is a full time job so we need to finish prototyping first.

reviews.review_title: Great game, too bad it’s quest 2 only
reviews.review_description: I’m stuck with a quest 1, tutorial is well explained. Can’t wait for further support.

developer_response.body:
Hi EBatti,

Unfortunately the prototype version doesn't support Quest 1. Sorry about this, we would love to support Quest 1, but it's very difficult with a small team, especially when we're prototyping a new experience which means we need to release new updates every week. We've added a note to the app description about this. We hope to support Quest 1 in the final release. Note that Swarm supports Quest 1 (apart from multiplayer) so if you want to play more you could buy the main game on the Oculus Store. Thanks for the review!

This game is crazy good that I never tried it I looked at the similarities then when I looked at the trailer of this one I was shocked but I'm going to play it later now I'll have so much fun hope I see you in the lobby or the place!

This game is amazing if you like spider man and you like shooting games, there is lots of races and combat to do! If you are a fan of Spider-Man or if you have ever played the game swarm this is a must try! (Also the slide race is the best race)
Makes me wanna turn off my grandma's life support

reviews.review_title: Why won't it let me play?
reviews.review_description: This game doesn't even let me play it. When ever I go on the game, it says I need to update it and then kicks me out of the game. Could someone please help me with this. I don't know if it's a glitch or not but what ever it is I really want it gone!
Every time I try to open the game it says “please update” or something.Can someone help?

reviews.review_title: Tell me how to fix it
reviews.review_description: When I downloaded the game I was doing the tutorial and when I finished It was like upgrading something I don’t know but when Itwas finishing it kicked me out the game and when I refreshed the game It went out the game and then went back in it was loading but then it kicked me every time the game Kicks￼ me out￼
Now it has update it lets me back in
I don’t know how you did it, I did not feel dizzy when swinging around, spoiler, the view at the top is amazing.
Could you add level like swarm ? With enemy lhow the tutorial
I love it add enemies it would be so much fun to swing around and shoot also add a mode were you fight other plays like a free for all and a team death match

This game has potential. The many multiplayer modes are interesting, and the grappling in spot on. The big issue is the lack of content. I know this is still early in development, so I hope this can be fixed soon!

reviews.review_title: This game tried to give me a seizure
reviews.review_description: When I got the game I wanted to play it when I went on all it did was flash colors in my eyes
